pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 27 creates user with email 'marcus.webb@helpdesk.local' via Tinker ORM
setup_task.sh lines 25-26 create user with first_name='Marcus' and last_name='Webb'
setup_freescout.sh line 207-208 shows admin email and credentials used for FreeScout login
verifier.py line 27 defines expected_status as 2 with comment '2 = Disabled'; export_result.sh captures current_status to compare
setup_task.sh line 30 creates user with '$u->status = 1; // Active'; verifier.py line 28 defines active_status as 1

privileged_info_summary: The task disables a synthetic user 'Marcus Webb' (marcus.webb@helpdesk.local) in FreeScout help desk system. The user starts in active state (status=1) and must be transitioned to disabled state (status=2). The admin account (admin@helpdesk.local) initiates the disabling action through the FreeScout web interface at http://localhost:8080. All user data is created synthetically by the setup script and exists only within the containerized FreeScout instance.
